name: Employment Contract
description: A standard employment agreement between an employer and a full-time or part-time employee.

sections.title: 1. Parties
sections.content: This Employment Contract ("Agreement") is entered into between {{employer_name}}, located at {{employer_address}} (the "Employer"), and {{employee_name}}, residing at {{employee_address}} (the "Employee"), effective as of {{start_date}}.

sections.title: 2. Position and Duties
sections.content: The Employer agrees to employ the Employee in the position of {{job_title}}. The Employee agrees to perform all duties and responsibilities associated with this position and such other duties as may be reasonably assigned by the Employer from time to time. The Employee shall devote their full working time and attention to the performance of these duties.

sections.title: 3. Hours of Work
sections.content: The standard working week shall be {{working_hours}} hours. The Employer may require the Employee to work additional hours as necessary to meet business needs, subject to applicable law.

sections.title: 4. Probationary Period
sections.content: The first {{probation_months}} months of employment shall constitute a probationary period. During this time, either party may terminate this Agreement with one week's written notice. Successful completion of the probationary period will be confirmed in writing by the Employer.

sections.title: 5. Remuneration
sections.content: The Employee shall receive a salary of {{salary}}, payable {{pay_frequency}}, subject to applicable tax deductions and withholdings. The Employer shall review the Employee's salary periodically, but is not obligated to increase it.

sections.title: 6. Annual Leave
sections.content: The Employee is entitled to {{holiday_days}} days of paid annual leave per year (pro-rated for the first year of employment). Leave must be scheduled in advance and approved by the Employer. Unused leave may not be carried over beyond the limits set by applicable law.

sections.title: 7. Confidentiality
sections.content: The Employee agrees to keep confidential all proprietary information, trade secrets, and other confidential information of the Employer, both during and after employment. This obligation continues indefinitely after termination of employment.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Any work product, inventions, developments, or intellectual property created by the Employee in the course of their employment shall be the exclusive property of the Employer. The Employee hereby assigns all rights, title, and interest in such work product to the Employer.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content: After the probationary period, either party may terminate this Agreement by providing {{notice_period}} written notice to the other party. The Employer may terminate this Agreement immediately and without notice in cases of gross misconduct, dishonesty, or material breach of this Agreement.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law}}.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
Both parties agree to the terms and conditions set out in this Employment Contract.

{{employer_name}}
Signature: _______________________
Name: ___________________________
Title: ___________________________
Date: ____________________________

{{employee_name}} (Employee)
Signature: _______________________
Date: ____________________________
